hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}" && __TEST_COMMAND__ 2>&1 | tail -3 > /tmp/project_test_result.txt; grep -qE "passed|ok|✓|no tests ran" /tmp/project_test_result.txt || echo '{"systemMessage":"\u26a0\ufe0f Tests fallaron al cerrar sesión. Revisá antes de hacer push."}' 2>/dev/null || true
